name: TikTok Shop platform qualification pack
change_note: Migrated from script PLATFORM_HINTS into a composable platform pack.
checklist_hints: Check official seller eligibility, category qualification, product listing, claims/content, and fulfillment requirements.
Separate cross-border seller route from local seller route.

requirements.requirement: Separate TikTok Shop local seller and cross-border seller routes and verify current official eligibility for the exact country site.
requirements.decision_effect: Wrong seller route or unsupported eligibility prevents approval.
requirements.notes: Seed platform requirement; country-site policies may differ.

requirements.requirement: Verify current category qualification, prohibited/restricted products, claims/content, and fulfillment requirements for the exact TikTok Shop market.
requirements.decision_effect: Unverified category eligibility or unsupported claims require more information or human escalation.
requirements.notes: Especially important for cosmetics, supplements, food, electronics, and household chemicals.

sources.title: TikTok Ads Help Center: Requirements to register as a seller on TikTok Shop
sources.confirms: TikTok Shop seller registration can require official business licenses, registrations, or similar documents showing eligibility to sell.

sources.title: TikTok Shop: Global Selling Seller Terms of Service
sources.confirms: TikTok Shop cross-border sellers must meet platform eligibility and customer order shipping policy requirements.

sources.title: TikTok Shop Seller Center: Prohibited Products Policy
sources.confirms: TikTok Shop prohibits illegal, unsafe, counterfeit, recalled, or regulated products that violate laws or TikTok Shop policies.

sources.title: TikTok Shop Seller Center: Restricted Products Policy
sources.confirms: TikTok Shop restricted products can require category-level or product-level qualifications, and TikTok Shop may request documentation.

sources.title: TikTok Shop Seller Center: Beauty and Personal Care Products Requirements
sources.confirms: TikTok Shop beauty and personal care products must comply with applicable laws and regulations and category requirements.

sources.title: TikTok Shop Seller Center: Content Policy
sources.confirms: TikTok Shop content cannot contain false, misleading, inconsistent, illegal, or unauthorized brand/IP claims.

gaps: Seed pack: verify current official TikTok Shop policy pages per case before final decisions.
